DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS6-L3-6501000-MSVPA-DBC-EUR-01 • Grade 6 • Personal, Social, Cultural, and Historical Context in Performance

The Ribbon and the Reel

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students doing?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the boy first say he likes the Irish jigs?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. How does the way the girl talks at the start tell you what kind of activity this is? How does the boy's answer about his grandpa shape where his preference really comes from?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  MU:Pr4.2c  |  MS Visual & Performing Arts: Music 6-8: Personal, Social, Cultural, and Historical Context in Performance
